```
POST https://i.speedscale.com:443/batch/ HTTP/2.0
Accept-Encoding: gzip
Content-Type: application/json
Host: i.speedscale.com
User-Agent: posthog-go/1.6.12
```

```
{
  "api_key": "REDACTED",
  "batch": [
    {
      "type": "capture",
      "uuid": "REDACTED",
      "library": "posthog-go",
      "library_version": "1.6.12",
      "timestamp": "2026-03-05T16:16:29.0032025-08:00",
      "distinct_id": "REDACTED",
      "event": "proxymock:mcp",
      "properties": {
        "$geoip_disable": true,
        "$groups": {
          "company": "REDACTED"
        },
        "$lib": "posthog-go",
        "$lib_version": "1.6.12",
        "appUrl": "app.speedscale.com",
        "buildVersion": "v2.5.182",
        "kind": "enterprise",
        "operatingSystem": "windows"
      },
      "send_feature_flags": null
    }
  ]
}
```

```
HTTP/2.0 200 OK
Access-Control-Allow-Credentials: true
Content-Type: application/json
Date: Fri\, 06 Mar 2026 00:16:31 GMT
Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin
Server: envoy
Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains

```

```
{
  "status": "Ok"
}
```
